_meta.note: Machine-seeded Wave 13-14. Real translated strings in native script. Human review required before ratification.

speakFriend.title: Jaalas jedhi, gali.
speakFriend.description: Liana Banyan afaan hundaaf banaatii ijaarame. Afaan tokko tokkoon badhaasa hiikkaa qaba.
speakFriend.provisionalNotice: Tarree afaanota fi gatiin Marks yeroo duraafi. Marks mallattoo hirmaannaa, akka hirmaannaa qabeenyaa miti.
speakFriend.bountyDescription: Liana Banyan gara {{language}} hiiki. {{marks}} Marks argadhu.
speakFriend.speakFounderDesc: Jechoonni karri tokko tokkoon sababaa qabanitti moggaafame. Madda maqaa 26 cimoo.
speakFriend.step1Body: Badhaasa Hiikuu Help Wanted irraa bana.
speakFriend.step2Body: Hunda strings barbaachisan hiiki. Bounty Poster dhan ergi.
speakFriend.step3Body: Erga fudhatamee booda, Marks argatta IP Ledger galmeeffama.
speakFriend.subtitle: "Jaalatamaa jedhi, gali."

languageSwitcher.tip: Fuula Durin irra jechoolee afaan gara garaa fayyadami muuxannoo addaa banachuuf!
